title: Records; receipts and disbursements
doc_html:
§1047.  Records; receipts and disbursements

The secretary-treasurer of the board shall keep a full record of all acts and proceedings of the board.  All moneys shall be received by him and disbursed in administering the provisions of this Chapter.
doc_text:
§1047.  Records; receipts and disbursements
The secretary-treasurer of the board shall keep a full record of all acts and proceedings of the board.  All moneys shall be received by him and disbursed in administering the provisions of this Chapter.
